target.title: [codex] fix reasoning tag leakage
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags across final assistant sanitization, embedded stream stripping, tagged-thinking promotion, and provider stream partitioning.
- Preserve literal prose/code examples such as `The <reasoning> tag...` while keeping unclosed reasoning-only blocks hidden.
- Handle attributed, split, namespaced, and self-closing reasoning tags without leaking private reasoning or suppressing following visible answer text.

## Root Cause

The stream partitioner already recognized `reasoning` tags, but the final delivery sanitizer and embedded subscriber tag matchers only covered think/thinking/thought variants. That left final channel replies and history extraction able to deliver raw `<reasoning>...</reasoning>` text.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Assistant-visible final text, text_end block replies, embedded streaming, and OpenAI-compatible provider partitioning now strip hidden `<reasoning>` blocks and preserve legitimate literal tag prose.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on the current branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tag-text-partitioner.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-reasoning-as-separate-message-enabled.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.filters-final-suppresses-output-without-start-tag.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `git diff --check`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check ...`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 3 unit-fast files / 152 tests and 2 agent files / 36 tests; `git diff --check` passed; `oxfmt --check` passed; the single local autoreview pass reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: Closed, attributed, split, namespaced, and self-closing reasoning tags no longer leak into visible replies; unclosed reasoning-only blocks stay hidden; literal markdown/code examples are preserved.

What was not tested: Full repository test suite and GitHub CI were not run locally for this draft PR.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tag-text-partitioner.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-reasoning-as-separate-message-enabled.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.filters-final-suppresses-output-without-start-tag.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tag-text-partitioner.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tag-text-partitioner.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.e2e-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.filters-final-suppresses-output-without-start-tag.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
